notes: Game works native on Linux, on Proton the game is only crashing all the time. I installed manually D9VK, but it didn't help.

notes: Game works native on Linux (OpenGL). On Proton it doesn't work with WineD3D, error message: "Your video card does not support aplha blending with floating point render targets (D3DFMT_A16B16G16R16F), which is required to run this game. Exiting...".  If you use PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command% as a launch option (available since Proton 4.11) the game starts and shows a logo, but then it will crash as well.
title: Q.U.B.E: Director's Cut
